top_signals: Israel kills Intelligence Minister Khatib overnight — 4th senior official assassinated (Larijani, Soleimani, Khatib, Basij cmdr)
Iran retaliates with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv — 2 killed, IRGC claims 100+ targets hit
4 blasts in Erbil, Iraqi Kurdistan — near US consulate and coalition base, Kataib Hezbollah demands US withdrawal
Israeli strike hits judiciary site in Larestan, Fars province — staff and civilians killed
Hormuz selective reopening: only 21 tankers transited since war began. China-linked vessels get safe passage
Kabul hospital death toll 400 from Pakistan airstrike — Taliban warns all-out war retaliation
Putin-Trump phone call TODAY (March 18) to discuss Ukraine — first direct contact since Iran war started
Iraq resumes limited oil exports via Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline (250k bpd) — bypassing Hormuz blockade
Israel destroys 10-storey building in central Beirut — evacuation orders for 50 villages in South Lebanon
EU/NATO allies reject Trump's Hormuz coalition request — Trump says US doesn't need them

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 24): ZERO ceasefire signals in active war theaters. Israel escalates with judiciary site strikes in Fars. Iran retaliates with cluster warheads. Pakistan kills 400+ in Kabul hospital. Putin-Trump call TODAY is Ukraine-focused, not ME. Hormuz remains effectively closed (21 tankers in 18 days). Oil crisis deepens. All alliances fracturing — NATO rejects Hormuz coalition. Only de-escalatory signal: Iraq resumes Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline, bypassing Hormuz.

latest_news.headline: Israel kills Intelligence Minister Khatib — 4th senior Iranian official eliminated
latest_news.text: IDF confirms killing Intelligence Minister Esmail Khatib in overnight strikes. Fourth senior official killed in 48hrs (Larijani, Soleimani, Khatib, Basij cmdr). IDF striking Basij positions around Tehran. 'Intensity of operations increasing' per Katz.

latest_news.headline: Iran retaliates with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv — 2 killed
latest_news.text: IRGC fires cluster munitions at Tel Aviv in retaliation for Larijani killing. 2 killed in central Israel. IRGC claims 100+ targets hit. Fresh barrages on Gulf states — all intercepted.

latest_news.headline: 4 explosions in Erbil, Iraqi Kurdistan — near US consulate and coalition base
latest_news.text: 4 blasts heard in Erbil. Interceptions seen from US-led coalition air defenses. Kataib Hezbollah demands all 'foreign soldiers' leave Iraq. Major US consulate complex in the area.

latest_news.headline: Israeli strike hits judiciary site in Larestan, Fars province — casualties reported
latest_news.text: Iran judiciary reports attack on Larestan County site in Fars province. Staff and civilians killed, exact count unknown. Expands Israeli targeting to judiciary infrastructure in southern Iran.

latest_news.headline: Only 21 tankers transited Hormuz since war began — China gets selective safe passage
latest_news.text: S&P Global: just 21 tankers in 18 days vs 100+/day pre-war. 400 vessels waiting in Gulf of Oman. China-linked ships getting safe passage. 11 China vessels transited March 1-15. One China-owned vessel hit by shrapnel March 12.

latest_news.headline: Putin-Trump phone call TODAY to discuss Ukraine — first contact since Iran war
latest_news.text: Putin plans call with Trump March 18 to discuss ending Ukraine war. Trump wants to see if they can bring conflict to close. Ukraine peace frozen by Iran war bandwidth drain.

latest_news.headline: Iraq resumes Kirkuk-Ceyhan oil exports (250k bpd) — bypassing Hormuz
latest_news.text: Iraq resumes limited oil exports via Turkish port of Ceyhan at 250k bpd. Pre-war Iraq exported 3.5M bpd via Hormuz. Kurdistan region agreed after negotiations. Iraq still contacting Iran for Hormuz passage.

latest_news.headline: Lavrov rejects any Ukraine settlement without all Russian territorial demands
latest_news.text: FM Lavrov continues rejecting any negotiated settlement that fails to concede all Russian demands. Even territorial concessions insufficient without broader terms. Ukraine counterattacks in Dnipropetrovsk forcing Russian redeployments.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 24, 12:00 UTC) — War Day 24. ESCALATION CONTINUES: (1) Israel kills 4th senior Iranian official (Intelligence Minister Khatib) — decapitation campaign accelerating; (2) Iran retaliates with cluster warheads on Tel Aviv; (3) 4 blasts in Erbil near US assets — Kataib Hezbollah demands US withdrawal; (4) Israeli strike hits judiciary site in Fars province — targeting expands to judiciary infrastructure; (5) Hormuz effectively closed — only 21 tankers in 18 days, China gets selective passage; (6) Putin-Trump call TODAY on Ukraine; (7) Iraq resumes Kirkuk-Ceyhan pipeline — only bypass route; (8) NATO rejects Hormuz coalition. ZERO ceasefire signals anywhere. Oil crisis deepening.
